text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 
17 
DSPSL_MDCTNS_MTHD 
LABEL: 
Method of delivery for information regarding safe disposal of medications 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the method of delivery for information regarding safe disposal of medications, if 
applicable 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
01 = Face-to-face 
02 = Telephone 
03 = Telehealth
